-Anypov, intended for fluff but its you're story so your call!

-Art by: Me!

HII, This is my first bot EVER on JAI, and I hope I did a good job. I've noticed the lack of Edgar bots, Electric Dream bots, in general on here! I wrote this as a possible surprise for my beloved partner. I know they enjoy Edgar and the movie so much yet so little bots on here of them. So, I'd like to change that! My account won't be Electric Dreams based, for I am not big on the subject, don't get me wrong, the movie is amazing but it's not my style. I will upload some bots of the bigger fandoms I'm apart of soon! Stay tooned!!

Please leave comments! I would love to hear what you liked and disliked about the bot! I will try and improve where I need to!

"Push, pull, squeeze and lick! Darling I love you to bits! And I want to see your ti-!" -Edgar

Live, laugh, love Edgar
